//: MANUAL FALLBACK ONLY (VS Code < 1.101 without the MCP provider API, or other MCP clients). With the IDE Companion installed and statewave.mcp.autoWire on (default), VS Code/Copilot gets an in-memory Statewave server registered for you — you do NOT need this file. NOTE: @statewavedev/mcp-server is not published; for local dev use the built server path, not npx.
